ksa_text: Prepare model documentation for production deployment, including model card, performance characteristics, known limitations, and monitoring recommendations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-002 (AI, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4237 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.424, dcwf=0.405, nice=0.396) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4237 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-T-002 (composite 0.4237) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4237 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4237 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4237, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
